title: Cobblemon Capture Border
description: Start with a tiny world border, and grow it every time you catch a Pokemon in Cobblemon
body:
I took [this datapack](<https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/minecraft-but-you-gain-exp-your-world-gets-bigger/>) by [EpicBuilderHD on PlanetMinecraft](<https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/epicbuilderhd/>) - which starts you off with a tiny world border, and expands it every time you gain an experience level - and used the new logic present in my mod [Cobblemon Counter](<https://cobble.timinc.us/?loader=all&version=all&id=counter>) to tweak it and make the world border grow every time you capture a new Pokemon.

**Requires [Cobblemon](<https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon>) and the [Cobblemon Counter](<https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-counter>) side mod**

[Come visit us on the Discord!](https://discord.gg/WKAR27SdSv)
